title: Seedy Saplings - Region's Unexplored
description: New seed and sapling appearances for Regions Unexplored! An unofficial mod compat for Seedy Saplings
body:
This pack features new seed sprites and names, and a new sapling stage for all Regions Unexplored saplings. Meant to be paired with the amazing Seedy Saplings by crabbarition! I originally made this for my world but thought others might like to use it too :)


Seedy Saplings: [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/seedy-saplings](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/seedy-saplings)

Regions Unexplored: [https://modrinth.com/mod/regions-unexplored](https://modrinth.com/mod/regions-unexplored)
